description: Themed bundle of 10 open issues filed in the upstream parent project manaflow-ai/cmux covering stability, rendering, theme, crashes, perf, config parsers, and infrastructure. These are NOT c11 issue numbers; every #N in this ticket refers to an issue in manaflow-ai/cmux. Picks: #3162, #2950, #1764, #3075, #2922, #1036, #2738, #2996, #2997, #2708. Reporters to credit: @knight42, @shaun0927, @gilsiun, @zacharygutt, @Corey-T1000, @austinywang, @tmad4000, @lawrencecchen, @Thinkscape, @exlaw. Plus related-issue reporter whose duplicate closes with the same fix: @tuzisang (#2718). Full rationale and per-pick credits in task note.
title: Upstream cmux issues: Stability, render, theme, crashes, perf, config, infra (10 picks)
